title: Carus Demon sleeps opponent creatures on summon

card.rawText: When summoned, all creatures on your opponent's side of the field are put to sleep and cannot battle for 2 turn cycles. Any damage to the sleeping creatures ends this effect and destroys 1 magic card on the field of your choice.

effect.value: When summoned, all creatures on your opponent's side of the field are put to sleep and cannot battle for 2 turn cycles. Any damage to the sleeping creatures ends this effect and destroys 1 magic card on the field of your choice.

plan.title: Carus Demon sleeps opponent creatures on summon
plan.summary: Summon Carus Demon and verify opponent creatures receive a two-turn-cycle sleep/no-battle status.

notes: Read text first: When summoned, all creatures on your opponent's side of the field are put to sleep and cannot battle for 2 turn cycles. Any damage to the sleeping creatures ends this effect and destroys 1 magic card on the field of your choice.

manualVerification: Damage to sleeping creatures should end the status and trigger a chosen magic destruction route later.
